body:
DIRECTIVE: FINAL DOCTRINE UPDATE — install the updated TUNGSTEN_EDGE_DOCTRINE.md (attached) over the prior copy. Two additions, both tested on 65k real bars. Everything prior stands.

== ADDENDUM A: WIN-RATE AND EDGE COEXIST (build as read-quality, ban only the geometry seesaw) ==
Corrected understanding, now proven: win-rate and edge are NOT opposed. They rise TOGETHER when the READ improves. VERIFIED at fixed TP2.0/SL1.2 (geometry untouched), sharpening the read: no-read -> 1 -> 2 -> 3 conditions gave win-rate 38.0->39.6->40.5->40.9% AND edge +0.010->+0.049->+0.073->+0.080 -- both climbing together. The only real tradeoff is win-rate vs payoff GEOMETRY at a fixed read (moving TP closer buys hit-rate by shrinking wins). RULE: win-rate is a first-class measure of read-quality; MAXIMISE it by sharpening the read (lenses, reverse-mining, interactions) at constant geometry; NEVER manufacture it by pulling the target in. No ceiling on win-rate, only a ban on faking it. Primary success signal = win-rate AND expectancy rising together at stable geometry across passes. Report both plus geometry on every edge so a win-rate change is always attributable to a better READ (both rise -- celebrate) or moved GEOMETRY (seesaw -- flag).

== ADDENDUM B: RETROSPECTIVE INTELLIGENCE (the standing self-improvement reflex) ==
Manuel's mandate: the system must ALWAYS seek better edge in retrospect -- contemplating its trades, losses and their circumstances, what it missed, what it over- and under-weighted, AND the moments it was correct and why, and the unfixed relationships. Always looking to self-improve. This is a PERMANENT reflex, not a phase.
BUILD: after every trading/calibration period, TUNGSTEN interrogates its own record across SIX questions, each empirically productive (verified on 65k bars):
 1. LOSSES TAKEN: compare losing-trade conditions vs winning ones within each edge; a distinguishing signature is a fixable avoidance filter. (Clean residual = honest finding, not failure.)
 2. WINS MISSED: profitable moments NOT traded -- the roads not taken that would have won. VERIFIED: the confirmed edge left 20,504 full-target wins untraded (37% of untraded bars). This maps exactly where to widen coverage -- the direct fix for low availability.
 3. OVER/UNDER-WEIGHTED: for each relied-upon feature, measure its within-traded-set IC vs outcome. Near-zero IC on a relied feature = over-weighted; strong IC on an ignored feature = under-weighted. VERIFIED: ema200_disp carried real info, rsi was mis-weighted -- a concrete re-weighting.
 4. WHY IT WAS CORRECT: the wins carry a signature too; the 'why' behind a win is a pattern to hunt MORE of. Reinforce what worked with the same rigour used to prune what didn't.
 5. THE UNFIXED RELATIONSHIP: after conditioning, is there STILL a feature separating remaining wins from losses? If yes, that is edge left on the table -- fold it in. If clean, that edge is fully extracted; move on.
 6. CALIBRATION OF ATTENTION: is the system's distribution of CONVICTION matched to the distribution of EVIDENCE? Over-conviction on thin signals and under-conviction on strong ones are both measurable attention errors.
THE LOOP: every trade -- taken or not, won or lost -- teaches the next read. Findings feed back as new Change Warrants (predict the gain, ship only if it beats the orthogonal metric out-of-sample, never regress). Bound by the invariant: every retrospective insight is a HYPOTHESIS until it replicates out-of-sample net-of-cost. Contemplation proposes; replication disposes. But the contemplation NEVER STOPS.

== BINDING & REPORTING ==
Retrospective intelligence runs each period and feeds the repertoire, the reverse-mining engine, and the nine-lens search. The honesty dashboard adds: the six-question review summary, wins-missed coverage gap, features found over/under-weighted, and the win-rate+expectancy joint trend at stable geometry. Stage-8 report states plainly what the system learned about ITSELF this pass and what it changed as a result.

STANDING LAW unchanged: expectancy net-of-cost is the objective; win-rate maximised via better reading only; replicate-or-discard; power-gate; survival before growth; Zero-Regression Law; live only on Manuel's explicit go-ahead. The complete aim: a system whose perception sharpens win-rate and edge together, that reviews its every trade like a master reviews every fight -- losses, misses, misjudged weights, and victories alike -- and returns to the market having learned, every time, forever.
